Class EntitlementService<V extends DiscordPurchase>

java.lang.Object
net.dv8tion.jda.api.hooks.ListenerAdapter
dev.chojo.aether.supporter.service.EntitlementService<V>
Type Parameters:
V - The type of Discord purchase handled by this service.
All Implemented Interfaces:
net.dv8tion.jda.api.hooks.EventListener
public abstract class EntitlementService<V extends DiscordPurchase> extends net.dv8tion.jda.api.hooks.ListenerAdapter
Base class for handling Discord Entitlements and managing subscriptions based on them.

This service implements ListenerAdapter to react to Discord entitlement events (create, update, delete). It provides the glue between Discord's monetization system and the supporter module's subscription management.

    • refresh

      public void refresh(net.dv8tion.jda.api.entities.Guild guild)
      Refreshes the entitlements for a guild.

      This will clear all existing Discord-based subscriptions for the guild and re-register all currently active entitlements retrieved from Discord.

      Parameters:
      guild - The guild to refresh.

    • enableSubscription

      public SubscriptionResult enableSubscription(V purchase, net.dv8tion.jda.api.entities.Guild guild)
      Enables a subscription for a guild based on a purchase.
      Parameters:
      purchase - The purchase to enable.
      guild - The guild to enable the subscription for.
      Returns:
      The result of the subscription attempt.

    • disableSubscription

      public boolean disableSubscription(V purchase)
      Disables a subscription based on a purchase.
      Parameters:
      purchase - The purchase to disable.
      Returns:
      true if the subscription was successfully disabled.

    • buildPurchase

      protected V buildPurchase(net.dv8tion.jda.api.entities.Entitlement entitlement, long subscriptionId, PurchaseType purchaseType)
      Build a purchase from the entitlement data
      Parameters:
      entitlement - entitlement
      subscriptionId - subscription id of the entitlement
      Returns:
      purchase

    • buildPurchase

      protected abstract V buildPurchase(long userId, long skuId, net.dv8tion.jda.api.entities.Entitlement.EntitlementType type, SkuTarget target, long subscriptionId, long entitlementId, @Nullable Instant expiresAt, long guildId, PurchaseType purchaseType)
      Build a purchase from the entitlement data
      Parameters:
      userId - The user id of the user that owns this entitlement.
      skuId - The id of the sku that this entitlement is for.
      type - The type of entitlement
      target - The target of the entitlement.
      subscriptionId - Id of the subscription that this entitlement is for.
      entitlementId - The id of the entitlement
      expiresAt - The time the entitlement expires
      guildId - The id of the guild that the purchase it attached to.
      purchaseType - the type of the purchase
      Returns:
      The purchase

    • registerPurchase

      protected abstract V registerPurchase(V purchase)
      Register a purchase at the persistent storage. This does not create a subscription.
      Parameters:
      purchase - The purchase to register.
      Returns:
      The registered purchase.

    • updatePurchase

      protected abstract V updatePurchase(V purchase)
      Update a purchase at the persistent storage. This does not create a subscription.

      A purchase can be uniquely identified by its DiscordPurchase.entitlementId()

      Parameters:
      purchase - The purchase to register.
      Returns:
      The registered purchase.

    • unregisterPurchase

      protected abstract V unregisterPurchase(V purchase)
      Unregister a purchase from the persistent storage.

      This does not remove the subscription.

      Parameters:
      purchase - the purchase to unregister.
      Returns:
      the unregistered purchase.

    • guildSubscriptions

      protected abstract Subscriptions guildSubscriptions(long guildId)
      Retrieves the subscriptions for a guild.
      Parameters:
      guildId - The ID of the guild.
      Returns:
      The subscriptions.

    • getExpiredPurchases

      protected abstract List<V> getExpiredPurchases()
      Get all expired purchases that are still assigned to a guild
      Returns:
      list of expired purchases
      See Also:
      • DiscordPurchase.expiresAt()
      • DiscordPurchase.guildId()
